parameters.jsCode: return { json: { ...$input.item.json, prompt: `Analyze this automation failure:\nFile: ${$json.filename}\nLogs: ${$json.errorLogs}` } };

parameters.subject: ={{ '🔴 Failed: ' + $item(0).$node["Run Playwright Test"].json.filename }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

AI analysis

' + ($node[\"AI RCA: Gemini\"].json.candidates ? $node[\"AI RCA: Gemini\"].json.candidates[0].content.parts[0].text : 'AI skipped.') + '

Logs

' + $item(0).$node[\"Run Playwright Test\"].json.errorLogs + '
' }}
